---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem**
What are you trying to do that's hard today? (e.g. "I can't tell which agents are stalled.")

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see.

**Acceptance criterion**
How would we know it works? (This project is spec-driven — features ship with a test that
proves a criterion. A crisp, testable statement helps a lot.)

**Alternatives / notes**
Anything else, including whether it fits the local-first, read-only, no-network constraints.
